analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE - MOESM10 does not contain 'Fig 5c' sheet. Available sheets: Fig 1b, 1f+g, 3c, 3f, 5a, 5b, 5d, 5e, 5g, 5h, 5i, 5j, 5l. Fig 5a has only text 'PTCH1' in one cell (no numeric data). No GLI1 qPCR values in MOESM4/6/7/8.
discrepancy_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - MOESM10 (source data workbook): 13 sheets [Fig 1b, 1f+g, 3c, 3f, 5a, 5b, 5d, 5e, 5g, 5h, 5i, 5j, 5l]
   - No 'Fig 5c' sheet exists in the source data file.
   - Sheet 'Fig 5a' contains only a single cell with text 'PTCH1' (no numeric qPCR data).
   - Sheet 'Fig 5b' contains cell proliferation trypan blue counts (not qPCR).
   - MOESM6 contains GLI1/GLI2/GLI3 references but these are snRNA-seq log fold changes across tumor subgroups, not qPCR fold changes in the PTCH1-KO HSC1λ experiment.
   - MOESM4/7/8 contain no GLI1 qPCR data.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - N/A at patient level; this is an in vitro qPCR experiment.
   - Paper states Fig 5c is based on n = 3 biologically independent experiments per Fig 5 legend.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Target: GLI1 expression fold change (qPCR)
   - Comparison: HSC1λ-gPTCH1 vs HSC1λ-gGFP
   - Normalization: presumably relative to gGFP baseline = 1.0

D. COMPUTATION
   - Cannot be performed - no numeric GLI1 qPCR values in source data.
   - Visual inspection of published Fig 5c (GLI1 panel) shows gGFP bar ~1.0 and gPTCH1 bar near ~3 (error bars extend into ~3.5-4 range), consistent with ~3-fold upregulation as reported.

E. RESULT
   - Reported: ~3-fold upregulation of GLI1 in HSC1λ-gPTCH1 vs gGFP (p < 0.05, n=3).
   - Model: DATA_UNAVAILABLE - source data workbook does not contain Fig 5c sheet.
   - Published figure visually supports the reported ~3-fold estimate, but exact quantitative verification is impossible without numeric qPCR data.

F. DISCREPANCY MAGNITUDE
   - N/A - model returned DATA_UNAVAILABLE; no numeric comparison possible.

G. ROOT CAUSE CLASSIFICATION
   - Root cause: 7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING - the authors did not include the Fig 5c qPCR numeric data as a separate sheet in the MOESM10 source data workbook, even though Fig 5c is cited as having 'Source data provided as source data file.' The available 'Fig 5a' sheet is essentially empty and other Fig 5 sheets (5b, 5d etc.) cover different panels.
   - The reported answer appears consistent with the published figure on visual inspection, but the underlying numeric values are not distributed with the paper in the location a reader would expect.

H. PROPOSED FIX
   - Mark this row as DATA_UNAVAILABLE rather than discrepant against a numeric benchmark. The reported ~3-fold value is a visual estimate from Fig 5c and should be treated as such. If strict verification is required, the raw qPCR Ct values would need to be requested from the authors or extracted from the figure via digitization.
proposed_fix: Mark as DATA_UNAVAILABLE; Fig 5c qPCR source data is not included as a sheet in MOESM10 source data workbook. Reported ~3-fold value from paper is a visual estimate from the bar graph (gGFP ≈ 1.0 vs gPTCH1 ≈ 3 in GLI1 panel) and is consistent with the published figure on visual inspection, but no numeric source data is available for quantitative verification.
